title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Divi's Laboratories

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Divi's Laboratories
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Divi's Laboratories in Kanpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Divi's Laboratories:
Divi's Laboratories is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Divi's Laboratories!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
